title: Improve optimizer skill guidance for contradiction analysis and approved invalidation workflow

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Reopened for follow-up skill refinements: add concrete mechanics and failure-mode hints for extracting contradiction candidates from stored report output, filtering approval candidates from the report itself, and avoiding item-by-item reconstruction before report triage.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Optimizer skill guidance update is complete. Both the high-level contradiction/invalidation framing and the new mechanical hints for report-first triage are now in the skill, and the follow-up task/story are closed.
